Name: Frequency of SW-EIC Reject occurring immediately after SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: Frequency of activity 'SW-EIC Reject' for cases where activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' occurs

Name: Percentage of process variants ending with SW-EIC Reject compared to all variants
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-EIC Reject' out of all cases

Name: Number of SW-EIC Reject decisions that follow a path containing at least one SW-Reviewer Agreed activity
Metric: Number of 'SW-EIC Reject' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-EIC Reject cases where no SW-Reviewer Agreed activity occurred during the review process
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-EIC Reject' out of all cases where 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' does not happen

Name: Frequency of SW-EIC Reject relative to the total number of manuscript submissions confirmed via Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-EIC Reject' out of all 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Ratio of SW-EIC Reject to SW-EIC Accept across all completed review cycles
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-EIC Reject' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Number of SW-EIC Reject decisions that are preceded by three or more SW-Reviewer Declined activities
Metric: Number of 'SW-EIC Reject' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' occurs

Name: Frequency of SW-EIC Reject occurring within 30 days of the initial manuscript submission
Metric: the sum of the function base < 30 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-EIC Reject' filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Percentage of SW-EIC Reject cases that bypass the AE recommendation phase (i.e., do not contain SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-EIC Reject' out of all cases where 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' does not happen

Name: Ratio of SW-EIC Reject to total occurrences of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-EIC Reject' out of all 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Number of SW-EIC Reject decisions that occur in the same case as an Immediate Reject Decision from the Checklist
Metric: Number of 'SW-EIC Reject' activities for cases where activity 'Immediate Reject Decision from the Checklist' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-EIC Reject that are part of short variants (length ≤ 6 activities) versus long variants (length > 20 activities)
Metric: the average of the function base <= 6 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Percentage of SW-EIC Reject out of all decision-making activities (e.g., SW-EIC Accept, SW-EIC Major Revision, SW-EIC Minor Revision, SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-EIC Reject'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'SW-EIC Accept' or activity == 'SW-EIC Major Revision' or activity == 'SW-EIC Minor Revision' or activity == 'SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit'"}"

Name: Percentage of SW-EIC Reject that occur without any prior reviewer agreement (i.e., without SW-Reviewer Agreed or RW-Reviewer Agreed)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-EIC Reject'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity != 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity != 'RW-Reviewer Agreed'"}"

Name: Percentage of SW-EIC Reject in variants that include reviewer invitation reminders (Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 or Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-EIC Reject'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' or activity == 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'"}"

Name: Number of SW-EIC Reject decisions that follow a plagiarism check outcome (Plagiarism Originality Report Completed or Plagiarism Percent Match Threshold Exceeded)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-EIC Reject'", 'aggregation': 'total', 'filter': "activity == 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' or activity == 'Plagiarism Percent Match Threshold Exceeded'"}"

Name: Percentage of SW-EIC Reject among all EIC-level decisions (including SW-EIC Accept, SW-EIC Major Revision, SW-EIC Minor Revision, SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-EIC Reject'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'SW-EIC Accept' or activity == 'SW-EIC Major Revision' or activity == 'SW-EIC Minor Revision' or activity == 'SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit'"}"

Name: Frequency of SW-EIC Reject in variants that never reach the reviewer assignment stage (i.e., no SW-AE Assign Reviewers or SW-Reviewer Agreed)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-EIC Reject'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity != 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity != 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'"}"

Name: Percentage of SW-EIC Reject cases that originate from manuscripts with checklist-related delays (e.g., containing SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days or SW-Checklist Completion now due)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-EIC Reject'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' or activity == 'SW-Checklist Completion now due'"}"

Name: Frequency of SW-EIC Reject following a path that includes Unassign Editor or Assign a Different Editor
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-EIC Reject'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'total', 'filter': "activity == 'Unassign Editor' or activity == 'Assign a Different Editor'"}"
